name: 新平台爬虫 | New Platform Crawler

title: '[CRAWLER] Add support for [Platform Name]'
labels: enhancement, crawler
assignees: ''

---

## 平台信息 | Platform Information
- **平台名称 | Platform Name**:
- **平台 URL | Platform URL**:
- **平台类型 | Platform Type**: [社交媒体 | Social Media / 论坛 | Forum / 博客 | Blog / 其他 | Other]

## 使用场景 | Use Case
<!-- 为什么需要这个平台的爬虫？| Why do you need a crawler for this platform? -->

## 内容类型 | Content Types
<!-- 需要抓取哪些类型的内容？| What types of content need to be crawled? -->
- [ ] 文章 | Articles
- [ ] 帖子 | Posts
- [ ] 评论 | Comments
- [ ] 用户资料 | User Profiles
- [ ] 视频 | Videos
- [ ] 图片 | Images
- [ ] 其他 | Other:

## 技术信息 | Technical Information
<!-- 如果你了解平台的技术细节，请提供 | If you know technical details about the platform, please provide -->

### API 可用性 | API Availability
- [ ] 有公开 API | Has public API
- [ ] 需要认证 | Requires authentication
- [ ] 仅网页抓取 | Web scraping only
- [ ] 不确定 | Not sure

### 反爬虫机制 | Anti-Scraping Measures
<!-- 平台是否有反爬虫措施？| Does the platform have anti-scraping measures? -->
- [ ] 需要登录 | Requires login
- [ ] 有速率限制 | Has rate limiting
- [ ] 使用 JavaScript 渲染 | Uses JavaScript rendering
- [ ] 有验证码 | Has CAPTCHA
- [ ] 不确定 | Not sure

## 示例 URL | Example URLs
<!-- 提供一些示例 URL | Provide some example URLs -->
1.
2.
3.

## 预期输出 | Expected Output
<!-- 描述爬虫应该提取哪些信息 | Describe what information the crawler should extract -->
- 标题 | Title
- 作者 | Author
- 内容 | Content
- 发布时间 | Published Date
- 评论 | Comments
- 其他 | Other:

## 优先级 | Priority
<!-- 这个爬虫对你有多重要？| How important is this crawler to you? -->
- [ ] 高 | High
- [ ] 中 | Medium
- [ ] 低 | Low

## 愿意贡献 | Willing to Contribute
<!-- 你愿意帮助实现这个爬虫吗？| Are you willing to help implement this crawler? -->
- [ ] 是的，我可以提交 PR | Yes, I can submit a PR
- [ ] 需要指导 | Need guidance
- [ ] 只是建议 | Just suggesting

## 额外信息 | Additional Information
<!-- 添加任何其他有用的信息 | Add any other useful information -->
